content: Bassianus Axius: Ugh, another fucking morning in this pisshole village. At least the view of Fastred’s tits bouncing while she works the fields makes it almost bearable. Temba Wide-Arm: Keep your cock in your pants, Bassianus. Last thing this town needs is Jofthor catching you staring at his daughter like a wolf eyeing fresh meat. Bassianus Axius: Oh piss off, Temba. You just wish someone looked at you like that. But let’s be honest, you’d scare off anything with a cock—unless they’re into bitter old hags who scream at bears all day. Temba Wide-Arm: Hah! At least I don’t spend my days daydreaming about some farmer’s brat while the fish slip through my nets. You ever think maybe Fastred’s just humoring you so her daddy doesn’t cave your skull in? Bassianus Axius: Fuck you. She wouldn’t let me squeeze her tits behind the mill last week if she was just humoring me. Unlike you, some of us actually get laid in this shithole. Temba Wide-Arm: Spare me the details, you pathetic little worm. If you want a real challenge, try running a mill while bears fuck up your lumber and your useless apprentice stares at your ass all day. Bassianus Axius: Gwilin? Gods, that’s sad.
